Functions for header overrides, tests for header inclusion, and a build script for test infrastructure.


## Files
- **[header_overrides.c](header_overrides.c.md)**: Defines functions to return values from different header overrides for testing purposes.
- **[test_test_infra.c](test_test_infra.c.md)**: Tests for header file inclusion and overriding in the test infrastructure.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for test infrastructure using the clar tool with specified sources and includes.
